metadata.title: Shah Alam - Columbia Asia Hospital I Private Hospital in Malaysia
metadata.description: We are a leading provider of private healthcare, recognized as one of the best hospitals in Malaysia. Here is the outstanding care you've been searching for.

markdown:
Shah Alam - Columbia Asia Hospital I Private Hospital in Malaysia [Skip to content](#jupiterx-main)

# Shah Alam

1.  [Home](https://www.columbiaasia.com/malaysia)
2.  [Hospitals](https://www.columbiaasia.com/malaysia/hospitals/)
3.  Shah Alam

# Columbia Asia Extended Care Hospital

# Shah Alam

[

Make an Appointment





](https://www.columbiaasia.com/malaysia/make-an-appointment/?hospital-maa=Shah%20Alam)

Columbia Asia Extended Care Hospital Shah Alam is a modern healthcare facility designed to provide 24-hour comprehensive nursing care and rehabilitation services for patients in need of long-term care.

  
As an Extended Care Hospital, our dedicated team of nurses and nursing aides aim to deliver health care with compassion and attention to each patient. We focus on providing comfort and care in a friendly, supportive environment, ensuring that our patients feel safe and well-cared for throughout their stay.

In addition to nursing care, our team of physiotherapists and occupational therapists work together with patients, offering personalized rehabilitation services aimed at helping them regain mobility and independence.

Our medical teams are specially trained to assist patients with a variety of medical conditions, including stroke, dementia, Parkinson’s disease, fractures, head and spinal injuries, and other conditions that require ongoing nursing care.

[Read More](#)

Columbia Asia Extended Care Hospital Shah Alam is a modern healthcare facility designed to provide 24-hour comprehensive nursing care and rehabilitation services for patients in need of long-term care.

As an Extended Care Hospital, our dedicated team of nurses and nursing aides aim to deliver health care with compassion and attention to each patient. We focus on providing comfort and care in a friendly, supportive environment, ensuring that our patients feel safe and well-cared for throughout their stay.  
  
In addition to nursing care, our team of physiotherapists and occupational therapists work together with patients, offering personalized rehabilitation services aimed at helping them regain mobility and independence.  
  
Our medical teams are specially trained to assist patients with a variety of medical conditions, including stroke, dementia, Parkinson's disease, fractures, head and spinal injuries, and other conditions that require ongoing nursing care.

Expertise in Medical Management for Non-acute Cases

Specialized Rehabilitation Support

24-Hour Comprehensive Nursing Care

Well-Equipped Medical Facilities

Dedicated and Friendly Staff

## **Services, Facilities & Rates**

The hospital provides comprehensive neurological and stroke rehabilitation tailored to patients of all functional levels. Our mission is to restore independence, rebuild confidence, and support each patient’s journey toward achieving their highest possible physical, psychological, and social well-being.

### Services & Facilities

24-hour Services

Dietary Review

House Call

Outpatient Medical Treatment

Physiotherapy

Pharmacy

Rental of Medical Equipment

Respite Care

Rental & Supply

Free Wi-Fi

24-hour Services

#### **24-Hour Services**

*   24-Hour Nursing Services by State Registered Nurses
*   Home Nursing
*   Post-hospitalization
*   Palliative Care
*   Short & Long Term Care

![](https://www.columbiaasia.com/malaysia/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/hospital-24-hours-service-2-scaled.jpg)

Dietary Review

#### **Dietary Review by Visiting Dietician**

*   Dietary Review by Visiting Dietitian

![](https://www.columbiaasia.com/malaysia/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/hospital-dietary-review-scaled.jpg)

House Call

*   Doctors House Calls

![](https://www.columbiaasia.com/malaysia/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/hospital-house-call-scaled.jpg)

Outpatient Medical Treatment

#### **Outpatient Medical Treatment**

Physiotherapy

Respite Care

## **Integrated Orthopedic Recovery Pathway**

Partnering with TAGS Chiro & Rehab, Columbia Asia Extended Care Hospital Shah Alam is proud to introduce an integrated care to provide full therapeutic support for surgical patients.
